creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jamie Gritton from comment #4)
> (In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #3)
> There's no current replacement, but I have a plan for one: getting those
> parameters (and others) from jls.  I'll work on that as a separate issue,
> which this will be dependent upon.

These sysctl lookups in poudriere are only looked up if *in a jail already*.
So jls won't work. Is there a different sysctl to lookup for that list?
